llmLabel.label: BFS on Grid / Graph
llmLabel.description: Breadth-first search on a grid or graph using a queue (deque) with visited set and frontier expansion.

llmLabel.label: BFS Level Order Traversal
llmLabel.description: Iterative breadth-first traversal using a deque to process tree nodes level by level, updating answer when a node is popped from the frontier.

llmLabel.label: Class API Design with Stateful Methods
llmLabel.description: Problems requiring implementation of a class with stateful methods and method dispatch, often using internal data structures like stacks or queues.

llmLabel.label: Tree Depth/Property Recursion
llmLabel.description: Recursively compute tree properties like depth, diameter, or equality using post-order traversal and max updates.

llmLabel.label: Sorting + Two-Pointer / Greedy Intervals
llmLabel.description: Sorts input array or intervals, then uses a while loop with sequential scan to compute answer inside the loop, typical for interval merging or two-sum variants.

llmLabel.label: Binary Tree DFS Path Sum
llmLabel.description: Recursive DFS on binary tree tracking path state from root to leaves to compute sums or counts.

llmLabel.label: Grid DFS with Recursion
llmLabel.description: Recursive depth-first search on a grid, often using nested loops to scan and a visited state or graph expansion.

llmLabel.label: Backtracking with Sorting
llmLabel.description: Recursive backtracking on sorted array to generate permutations or subsets, often with duplicate handling.

llmLabel.label: Grid Traversal with State Tracking
llmLabel.description: Iterates over a grid using nested loops or while loops, tracking coordinates and left/right boundaries to solve problems like spiral matrix, set matrix zeroes, number of islands, or flood fill.

llmLabel.label: BST Inorder Traversal
llmLabel.description: Inorder traversal of a binary search tree using recursion and state variables for left, node, and right children.

llmLabel.label: Sliding Window with Counter
llmLabel.description: Uses two pointers and a counter to expand then shrink a window, updating answer after shrinking.

llmLabel.label: Frequency Counting with Nested Loops
llmLabel.description: Uses nested loops and a dictionary to count frequencies, often for substring or top-k problems.

llmLabel.label: Sliding Window / Interval Scheduling with Heap
llmLabel.description: Uses a heap to maintain a dynamic set of elements while scanning sequentially, often for sliding window maximum or meeting room allocation.

llmLabel.label: Two-Pointer Trapping Rain Water
llmLabel.description: Uses left and right pointers with sequential scan to compute trapped water via min height updates.

llmLabel.label: Queue-based Stack & Zigzag Iterator
llmLabel.description: Uses deque and class API to implement stack or iterator via method dispatch and object state.

llmLabel.label: Iterative BST Traversal
llmLabel.description: Iterative in-order traversal of a BST using a while loop and stack to track left, node, and right states.

llmLabel.label: Asteroid Collision Simulation
llmLabel.description: Simulates asteroid collisions using a stack with nested loops and while loop for resolving collisions.

llmLabel.label: Asteroid Collision Simulation
llmLabel.description: Simulate asteroid collisions using a stack with nested loops for direction-based resolution.

llmLabel.label: Maximum Subarray / Stock Trading (Kadane's)
llmLabel.description: Single pass tracking min/max to find best profit or subarray sum.

llmLabel.label: Maximum Subarray / Stock Trading (Kadane's)
llmLabel.description: Single pass tracking min and max to find maximum profit or subarray sum.

llmLabel.label: Monotonic Stack
llmLabel.description: Uses a stack to find next greater element by scanning array with nested loops and while loop for stack maintenance.

llmLabel.label: String Decoding with Stack
llmLabel.description: Uses a for loop to sequentially scan an array while updating answer inside the loop, typical for decoding nested patterns like '3[a]2[bc]'.

llmLabel.label: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
llmLabel.description: Evaluates an arithmetic expression in Reverse Polish Notation using a stack and sequential scan.

llmLabel.label: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
llmLabel.description: Evaluates an arithmetic expression in Reverse Polish Notation using a stack and sequential scan.

llmLabel.label: Union-Find for Graph Validity
llmLabel.description: Uses union-find with path compression and union by rank to detect cycles and check connectivity for graph validity.

llmLabel.label: Insert Interval
llmLabel.description: Insert a new interval into a sorted list of non-overlapping intervals, merging overlaps by scanning and updating min/max bounds.

llmLabel.label: Floyd's Cycle Detection (Tortoise and Hare)
llmLabel.description: Uses two pointers moving at different speeds to detect a cycle in a linked list.

llmLabel.label: Longest Consecutive Sequence (Hash Set)
llmLabel.description: Uses a set for O(1) membership checks and scans to find the start of each consecutive sequence, updating the maximum length.

llmLabel.label: LRU Cache (Doubly Linked List + HashMap)
llmLabel.description: Implements LRU cache using a doubly linked list and hash map with recursive helper methods for node operations.

llmLabel.label: Maximum Product Subarray (Kadane's variant)
llmLabel.description: Track both max and min product ending at each position to handle sign flips.

llmLabel.label: Kadane's Algorithm
llmLabel.description: Finds the maximum subarray sum using a single pass with local and global maxima updates.

llmLabel.label: Kadane's Algorithm
llmLabel.description: Finds the maximum subarray sum using a single pass with local and global maxima updates.

llmLabel.label: Move Zeroes (Two-Pointer)
llmLabel.description: Uses a for loop to scan the array and a pointer to place non-zero elements sequentially.

llmLabel.label: Nested List Weight Sum (DFS)
llmLabel.description: Recursively traverses a nested list structure, computing weighted sum by depth using nested loops and a while loop for iteration.

llmLabel.label: Nested List Weight Sum (DFS)
llmLabel.description: Recursive depth-first traversal of nested integer lists with weighted sum accumulation.

llmLabel.label: Sliding Window Counter
llmLabel.description: Uses a counter and two pointers to track elements within a time window, incrementing count as new elements arrive.

llmLabel.label: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow (DFS from borders)
llmLabel.description: DFS from ocean borders with state tracking using sets and nested loops

llmLabel.label: Palindrome Check with While Loop
llmLabel.description: Uses a while loop to reverse digits of an integer and compare to original for palindrome detection.

llmLabel.label: Palindrome Check with While Loop
llmLabel.description: Check if a number is a palindrome by reversing digits with a while loop and comparing to original.

llmLabel.label: Path Sum III (Prefix Sum + DFS)
llmLabel.description: Counts paths in a binary tree that sum to a target using prefix sums and DFS with a counter and graph state.

llmLabel.label: Prefix Product with Nested Loop
llmLabel.description: Uses a nested loop to compute prefix products for each element, updating answer inside the scan.

llmLabel.label: 2D DP for String Matching
llmLabel.description: Dynamic programming on a grid for string matching with state transitions during nested loops

llmLabel.label: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
llmLabel.description: Uses a for loop to scan a sorted array and overwrite duplicates in-place with a two-pointer technique.

llmLabel.label: In-Place Array Removal with Two Pointers
llmLabel.description: Uses a for loop to scan the array and conditionally overwrite elements to remove a target value in-place.

llmLabel.label: Reverse Linked List (Iterative)
llmLabel.description: Iteratively reverses a linked list using a while loop and pointer manipulation.

llmLabel.label: Binary Search on 2D Matrix
llmLabel.description: Binary search on a sorted 2D matrix using row/col coordinate mapping and midpoint computation.

llmLabel.label: String to Integer (atoi)
llmLabel.description: Parses a string to an integer by skipping whitespace, handling sign, and accumulating digits with overflow detection.

llmLabel.label: Prefix Sum with Hash Map
llmLabel.description: Accumulate prefix sums and use a hash map to count occurrences, then look up complement to find subarrays summing to k.

llmLabel.label: Two-Pointer Trapping Rain Water
llmLabel.description: Uses two pointers scanning inward with left/right max updates to compute trapped water.

llmLabel.label: Two Pointers (Palindrome Check)
llmLabel.description: Uses a while loop with two pointers scanning from both ends to check if a string is a palindrome.

llmLabel.label: Stack-based Parentheses Matching
llmLabel.description: Uses a stack to validate bracket sequences by matching closing brackets to the most recent opening bracket.

llmLabel.label: Stack-based Parentheses Matching
llmLabel.description: Uses a stack to validate bracket sequences by scanning left to right and matching closing brackets.
